name: happy-path-variant-b
task: Add a real-time WebSocket subscription to the polymarket domain that streams live price updates for a set of prediction market tokens. This should emit events that the frontend can consume via IPC.
assertions: Response connects to `wss://ws-subscriptions-clob.polymarket.com/ws/market` for the WebSocket endpoint
Response sends a JSON message with `type: 'subscribe'` and a `markets` array of token IDs to initiate the subscription
Response implements reconnection logic or error handling for WebSocket disconnections
Response uses `JSON.parse` to decode incoming WebSocket messages (since the protocol uses JSON framing)
Response emits parsed price update events through an IPC channel or event emitter pattern, not returning raw WebSocket frames to the frontend
